overview: Worked on improving the reliability and performance of conversion tracking systems used across Google Ads.
points: Built scalable error logging and diagnostics for non-replayable user conversion traffic.
Validated and rolled out project outputs through full coverage tests and SQL queries.
Improved data accuracy and reduced conversion tracking issues across global systems.

overview: Designed and implemented automated data pipelines and visual analytics dashboards for Google Fi fraud detection.
points: Architected an automated daily running C++ pipeline, simplifying Google Fi latency by 90 percent.
Created a workflow that queried data in SQL to a dashboard to display statistical information.
Drafted comprehensive pipeline and dashboard design docs with detailed workflow descriptions.

overview: Collaborated in a team of front-end developers to build the official club website for the Women in Computer Science organization.
points: Assisted in creating the official club website using Astro and Tailwind CSS.
Developed fully responsive socials, timeline, and styled event components.
Collaborated with a large team using Git/GitHub to ensure seamless integration.

overview: Developed databases and instructed youth in STEM and technology concepts.

overview: Developed and styled web applications and user interfaces for DNA analytics.
